summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Restaurateur Pro MVP. Backend APIs are functional with proper authentication. Frontend landing page, OAuth flow, and authentication guards work correctly. Site demographics API returns live data. All 6 dashboard modules are implemented and ready for authenticated users.
passed_tests: Site demographics API returns live demographic data
Auth endpoints properly require authentication (401 responses)
All protected endpoints correctly return 401 without auth
Landing page renders correctly with all elements
Google Sign In button redirects to Emergent Auth
OAuth redirect to auth.emergentagent.com works correctly
Dashboard authentication guard redirects unauthenticated users
All 6 module cards displayed on landing page
Navigation and CTA buttons are present and functional
